title: Keep Swimming
description: A Minecraft mod that keeps you afloat in water during actions that would usually make you sink.
body:
💧 A Minecraft mod that keeps you afloat in water during actions that would usually make you sink.
### ❓ Keep swimming when: - Typing in Chat - Editing Signs - Trading with Villagers - Opening Inventories - And more!
### ⚠️ Disclaimer: Singleplayer & servers w/ the mod installed - Due to this technically being a cheat, in order to comply with Modrinth's rules, the mod will not be available on multiplayer servers without the mod installed. You can find Modrinths rules [here](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules).
### ✏️ Quick Notes: - There's a hotkey in your keybind settings. This can be used to toggle the mod. - The "always" option will make it so you always float in water. - The "evenflying" option will make the mod work, even when you have flight permissions (creative etc.)
### 🎨 Customization - Command: /keepswimming
![Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb15b5969f473f613483c6f340dfba4fcbc7a933.png)
### 🐛 Issue/Bug Tracker - https://github.com/Solyze/KeepSwimming/issues
### 💻 Source Code - https://github.com/Solyze/KeepSwimming
### ❓ Support Server - https://discord.gg/ncBX47WpW2
